items.title: Tokenisation via Convex Relaxations
items.summary: Tokenisation is an integral part of the current NLP pipeline. Current tokenisation algorithms such as BPE and Unigram are greedy algorithms -- they make locally optimal decisions without considering the resulting vocabulary as a whole. We instead formulate tokeniser construction as a linear program…

items.title: Which Way Did It Move? Diagnosing and Overcoming Directional Motion Blindness in Video-LLMs
items.summary: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have made rapid progress on temporal video understanding, yet many fail at a basic perceptual primitive: signed image-plane motion direction. On simple videos of a single object moving left, right, up, or down, most Video-LLMs perform near chance, with above…

items.title: Integrable Elasticity via Neural Demand Potentials
items.summary: We propose the Integrable Context-Dependent Demand Network (ICDN), a demand-first neural model for multiproduct retail demand. The model learns log-demand as a smooth, context-conditioned function of log-prices, allowing elasticities to be derived exactly from the learned demand surface. On the Dom…

items.title: Cambrian-P: Pose-Grounded Video Understanding
items.summary: Camera pose matters. The position and orientation of each viewpoint define a shared spatial coordinate frame that relates observations across video frames. items.title: MotiMotion: Motion-Controlled Video Generation with Visual Reasoning
items.summary: Current motion-controlled image-to-video generation models rigidly follow user-provided trajectories that are often sparse, imprecise, and causally incomplete. Such reliance often yields unnatural or implausible outcomes, especially by missing secondary causal consequences. To address this, we intr…

items.title: Vector Policy Optimization: Training for Diversity Improves Test-Time Search
items.summary: Language models must now generalize out of the box to novel environments and work inside inference-scaling search procedures, such as AlphaEvolve, that select rollouts with a variety of task-specific reward functions. items.title: AwareVLN: Reasoning with Self-awareness for Vision-Language Navigation
items.summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) requires an agent to ground language instructions to its own movement within a visual environment. items.title: Remember to be Curious: Episodic Context and Persistent Worlds for 3D Exploration
items.summary: Exploration is a prerequisite for learning useful behaviors in sparse-reward, long-horizon tasks, particularly within 3D environments. items.title: GesVLA: Gesture-Aware Vision-Language-Action Model Embedded Representations
items.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong potential for general-purpose robot manipulation by unifying perception and action. items.title: Finite-Particle Convergence Rates for Conservative and Non-Conservative Drifting Models
items.summary: We propose and analyze a conservative drifting method for one-step generative modeling. items.title: MOSS: Self-Evolution through Source-Level Rewriting in Autonomous Agent Systems
items.summary: Autonomous agentic systems are largely static after deployment: they do not learn from user interactions, and recurring failures persist until the next human-driven update ships a fix. items.title: Gated DeltaNet-2: Decoupling Erase and Write in Linear Attention
items.summary: Linear attention replaces the unbounded cache of softmax attention with a fixed-size recurrent state, reducing sequence mixing to linear time and decoding to constant memory. items.summary: The Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (FJSP) is the optimal allocation of a set of jobs to machines. items.title: Reducing Political Manipulation with Consistency Training
items.summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic political bias across a variety of sensitive contexts. items.title: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on Large Language Models Pre-training

items.title: The Distillation Game: Adaptive Attacks & Efficient Defenses

items.title: Optimization over the intersection of manifolds
